text: Akıllı ulaşım sistemi (ITS), farklı ulaşım modları ve trafik yönetimiyle ilgili hizmetler sunarak kullanıcıların daha bilinçli, güvenli, koordineli ve akıllı ulaşım ağı kullanımı sağlamayı amaçlayan gelişmiş bir uygulamadır.
validation_reason: The nugget is a direct and accurate translation of the first sentence in the original chunk: 'An intelligent transportation system (ITS) is an advanced application that aims to provide services relating to different modes of transport and traffic management and enable users to be better informed and make safer, more coordinated, and 'smarter' use of transport networks.'
storage_reason: This nugget provides a foundational definition of ITS, making it a high-priority item for the dataset.

text: Avrupa Birliği'nin 2010/40/EU direktifi, ITS'yi karayolu taşımacılığı alanında (altyapı, araçlar, kullanıcılar dahil) bilgi ve iletişim teknolojilerinin uygulandığı sistemler olarak tanımlar.
validation_reason: The nugget accurately reflects the definition of ITS by the European Union's 2010/40/EU directive as stated in the original chunk: 'the directive of the European Union 2010/40/EU... defined ITS as systems in which information and communication technologies are applied in the field of road transport, including infrastructure, vehicles and users...'
storage_reason: This nugget offers a specific, authoritative definition of ITS from the EU, which is valuable for understanding its scope.

text: ITS, karayolu taşımacılığı, trafik yönetimi veya mobilite gibi birçok durumda ulaşımın verimliliğini ve güvenliğini artırmak için kullanılabilir.
validation_reason: The nugget is a direct and accurate translation of the sentence in the original chunk: 'ITS may be used to improve the efficiency and safety of transport in many situations, e.g., road transport, traffic management, or mobility.'
storage_reason: This nugget highlights the core benefits and applications of ITS, making it a key piece of information.

text: İşbirlikçi Akıllı Ulaşım Sistemleri (C-ITS), araçlar arası (V2V) ve araçtan altyapıya (V2I) iletişim yoluyla veri paylaşarak araçlar ve altyapı arasında bağlantı kurar.
validation_reason: The nugget is directly supported by the sentence: 'A significant trend in ITS is the development of Cooperative ITS (C-ITS), where vehicles and infrastructure are interconnected. Data is shared through vehicle-to-vehicle (V2V) and vehicle-to-infrastructure (V2I) communication.'
